title: Cozy Living Room with Comfortable Furniture and Warm Lighting
description: A cozy and inviting living room featuring a plush beige sofa with soft knitted throws and cushions, warm natural lighting filtering through sheer curtains, a wooden coffee table with a candle and books, a wicker armchair with a throw, and minimalistic decor including a potted plant and framed abstract art. The atmosphere is calm, peaceful, and relaxed, emphasizing comfort and simplicity in home design.
